name: 15 · Stream Python Body
description: LiveReduce: a long-lived Python reducer receives chunks via IPC (aithericon.chunks()) from a streaming producer. The producer (streamOutput=true) emits 4 word chunks (the/quick/brown/fox); the StreamConsumer is a thin router that forwards chunks via EXECUTOR_STREAM_FEED and sends EOF; the reducer uppercases and concatenates them into 'THE QUICK BROWN FOX'. The Python script owns the reduction logic — no Petri-net gather barrier.
